summary: The diff implements a new LoveLetterPage React component that faithfully recreates the provided HTML design. All major requirements from REQ-1 appear to be addressed: dark background, floating emojis with staggered delays, parchment letter container, correct header, full letter body with highlighted spans, footer signature, wax seal, Google Fonts imports, and responsive styles. The implementation is well-aligned with the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Attribution footer linking to caffeine.ai is rendered at the bottom of the page
hallucinated_features.reason: The provided HTML design specification does not mention any attribution footer or caffeine.ai branding; this was added without being requested

hallucinated_features.description: Parchment texture overlay using an external transparenttextures.com image URL
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a parchment texture overlay image from an external URL; this visual detail was added beyond the spec
